failure_reason: Added focused BodySource execution for the final source-originated operator== return from original container-Rule.bml: return m_hItem == hOther.Item;. Initial proof setup used records for the process equality guard, exposing that value_eq intentionally does not compare records; corrected the proof fixture to use a comparable process value. Final-return proof returns 16383 across Go/Rust/TypeScript, adjacent operator proofs remain 4095, HashCode return remains 16383, BML file forward/backward remains 131071, and the BML/BMF native-boundary audit remains green.
